caption: Lena glides through the frost-kissed hallway, her fitted blouse catching the soft winter light as she leans against lockers, a playful smirk playing on her lips. Her pencil skirt hugs her curves, and the faint scent of cinnamon from the nearby café swirls around her. ❄️💖 #UniversityGlam #SexyStudentLife #WinterCharm
